name: Sustainable Cities and Communities
description: Make cities and human settlements inclusive, safe, resilient and sustainable

targets.name: Safe and Affordable Housing
targets.description: By 2030, ensure access for all to adequate, safe and affordable housing and basic services and upgrade slums
procurement_criteria: Affordable housing provisions in construction tenders
Universal design standards for inclusive housing

targets.name: Sustainable Transport Systems
targets.description: By 2030, provide access to safe, affordable, accessible and sustainable transport systems for all

targets.name: Inclusive Urbanization
targets.description: By 2030, enhance inclusive and sustainable urbanization and capacity for participatory planning

targets.name: Cultural and Natural Heritage
targets.description: Strengthen efforts to protect and safeguard the world's cultural and natural heritage

targets.name: Disaster Risk Reduction
targets.description: By 2030, significantly reduce the number of deaths and people affected by disasters

targets.name: Environmental Impact of Cities
targets.description: By 2030, reduce the adverse per capita environmental impact of cities, including air quality and waste management
procurement_criteria: NAAQS (National Ambient Air Quality Standards) compliance

targets.name: Green and Public Spaces
targets.description: By 2030, provide universal access to safe, inclusive and accessible green and public spaces
procurement_criteria: Green space provisions in urban projects

targets.name: Urban-Rural Linkages
targets.description: Support positive economic, social and environmental links between urban, peri-urban and rural areas
procurement_criteria: Supply chain sustainability from rural areas

targets.name: Resilience and Resource Efficiency
targets.description: Increase the number of cities adopting integrated policies for inclusion, resource efficiency, climate change mitigation and adaptation

targets.name: Sustainable Buildings in LDCs
targets.description: Support least developed countries in building sustainable and resilient buildings utilizing local materials
procurement_criteria: Local labor and skill development provisions
